title.rendered: [Free Mini Webinar] How to Use AI Tools to Create Visual Content for Your Nonprofit

content.rendered:
Date: Wednesday, November 20, 2024
Time: 3 pm ET / 12 pm PT (20 Minutes)
Cost: Free
Presented by: Kyle Behrend, Founder of NFPs.AI 

Discover how to inject creativity into your nonprofit’s work using generative AI tools. This 20-minute webinar will showcase useful AI applications that can help your nonprofit easily create digital marketing and fundraising images and graphics to add a creative twist to your campaigns. Learn to:

• Generate engaging visuals with AI image-creation tools
• Explore artistic styles using AI-powered image analysis
• Create unique AI-composed music and jingles

 Register Now!

Please Note: This webinar will be recorded. If you can not attend the webinar live, you will be sent a link to the recording 24-48 hours after the webinar is over. Visit GoToWebinar’s Attendee System Check for information on how to join and attend this webinar.
